tools.name: send_keyboard_key
tools.description: Send a single keyboard key event. Parameters: key (string, PcKeyboardKey enum name like 'Enter' or 'Escape'), isPressed (bool, true=key down, false=key up). For a full keypress, call twice: once with isPressed=true, then with isPressed=false. Use PcKeyboardKey enum names: Escape, Enter, A-Z, Up, Down, Left, Right, F1-F12, Space, Tab, etc.

tools.name: read_ems_memory
tools.description: Read bytes from a specific EMS handle and logical page. Returns hex-encoded data.

tools.name: read_pc_speaker_state
tools.description: Read PC speaker state: port 0x61 control value, timer-2 gate enable, speaker output enable, timer-2 output level, and mixer channel info.

tools.name: video_read_pixel
tools.description: Read the color index of a pixel at (x, y) in the current graphics mode.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot as PNG. No parameters. Returns base64 image data inline plus metadata (width, height, file path). MCP clients that support images will display it directly.

tools.name: read_dos_program_state
tools.description: Read current DOS process state: PSP segment, parent PSP, environment segment, max open files, allocated paragraphs, and command tail length.

tools.name: opl_write_register
tools.description: Write an OPL register (0x000-0x1FF) with a byte value. Controls FM synthesis operators, channels, and global settings.

tools.name: list_breakpoints
tools.description: List all breakpoints managed by this MCP session, with their IDs, addresses, types, conditions, and enable state.

tools.name: cryogenic_status
tools.description: Read Cryogenic MCP extension state. Parameters: none (arguments must be {}). Returns tool assembly name, remapped driver segments, interrupt handler segment, and detected runtime MIDI segment.

tools.name: read_midi_state
tools.description: Read MPU-401 MIDI state: device kind (GeneralMidi/MT32), MT-32 ROM path, operational state, status flags, and data/status port addresses.

tools.name: write_memory
tools.description: Write hex-encoded bytes to memory. Parameters: segment (ushort), offset (ushort), data (hex string like 'B80200'). Address is two separate integers, not a combined string. Max 4096 bytes.

tools.name: read_sound_blaster_state
tools.description: Read Sound Blaster configuration: SB type, base address, IRQ, DMA channels, BLASTER environment string, speaker enable state, DSP sample rate, and test register.

tools.name: video_write_text
tools.description: Write a text string at the current cursor position in the active text page.

tools.name: read_xms_state
tools.description: Read XMS (Extended Memory) state: total/free/largest-block memory in KB, HMA availability, allocated block handles with sizes and lock counts.

tools.name: read_stack
tools.description: Read the top N 16-bit values from the stack at SS:SP. Returns each address and word value.

tools.name: clear_breakpoints
tools.description: Remove all breakpoints managed by this MCP session.

tools.name: add_breakpoint
tools.description: Add a breakpoint. Parameters: address (long, physical linear address), type (string: CPU_EXECUTION_ADDRESS, MEMORY_ACCESS, MEMORY_WRITE, MEMORY_READ, IO_ACCESS, IO_WRITE, IO_READ), condition (string or null for unconditional).

tools.name: read_video_state
tools.description: Read basic VGA renderer state: current width, height, and framebuffer size in pixels.

tools.name: search_xms_memory
tools.description: Search for a hex byte pattern within one XMS block. Returns matching offsets within the block.

tools.name: cryogenic_mt32_call_counts
tools.description: Read MT-32 override call counters for this emulator process. Parameters: none (arguments must be {}). Returns a dictionary keyed by exported entry point (for example F000:0100) with integer call counts.

tools.name: search_ems_memory
tools.description: Search for a hex byte pattern within one EMS logical page. Returns matching offsets within the page.

tools.name: read_video_state_detailed
tools.description: Read detailed VGA state: BIOS video mode, VGA mode object, cursor position, screen columns/rows, and renderer dimensions. More complete than read_video_state.

tools.name: read_sound_blaster_dsp_version
tools.description: Read the Sound Blaster DSP version by issuing the GetVersion DSP command. Returns major and minor version numbers.

tools.name: mcp_about
tools.description: Describe the MCP server purpose, capability scope, version, and discovery guidance for AI clients

tools.name: read_sound_blaster_mixer_state
tools.description: Read Sound Blaster mixer volume levels (master, DAC, FM, CD, line-in, microphone) and stereo/filter enable state.

tools.name: cryogenic_mt32_capture_diagnose
tools.description: Diagnose MT-32 capture quality and emit parity-friendly metrics. Parameters: sampleSize (int, optional, default 32). Returns byte-level filter counters, event-class histogram, event signature hash, and first event signatures.

tools.name: read_dos_state
tools.description: Read DOS kernel state: current drive, drive index, mounted drives with host directories, PSP segment, device count, and EMS/XMS availability.

tools.name: read_video_cursor
tools.description: Read the text-mode cursor position (x, y, page) and the character plus attribute stored at that location.

tools.name: read_interrupt_vector
tools.description: Read an interrupt vector (0x00-0xFF) from the IVT. Returns the segmented address (segment:offset) the vector points to.

tools.name: remove_breakpoint
tools.description: Remove a single MCP-managed breakpoint by its ID.

tools.name: send_mouse_packet
tools.description: Send a raw PS/2 mouse packet (3 hex bytes) through the controller AUX port. Format: SSXXYY where SS=status, XX=X delta, YY=Y delta. Example: 080000 (no movement, no button).

maxEvents.description: Maximum OPL write events to capture before dropping. Default 50000.

tools.name: read_disassembly
tools.description: Disassemble x86 real-mode instructions. Parameters: segment (ushort), offset (ushort), instructionCount (int, 1-500). Address is two separate integers, not a combined string. Returns array of instructions with address, raw bytes, and assembly text.

tools.name: pc_speaker_set_control
tools.description: Set PC speaker timer-2 gate and speaker output bits via port 0x61 semantics.

tools.name: write_io_port
tools.description: Write a byte to an x86 IO port (0-65535). Triggers the emulated device handler for that port.

tools.name: read_cfg_cpu_graph
tools.description: Read the Control Flow Graph built by the CPU. Returns execution context depth, entry point addresses, last executed address, and graph nodes with successor/predecessor edges for each instruction. Use nodeLimit to cap BFS traversal; omit or pass null for the full graph.

take.description: Number of events to return from the start. Default 500.

tools.name: cryogenic_mt32_capture_dump
tools.description: Dump MT-32 golden capture data (metadata + events). Parameters: none (arguments must be {}). Returns JSON-friendly capture payload.

tools.name: pause_emulator
tools.description: Pause the emulator immediately. Use this before inspecting CPU state, memory, or any device registers.

tools.name: list_functions
tools.description: List discovered functions ordered by call count. Returns address, name, call count, and override status for each function. Use limit to cap the result size.

tools.name: cryogenic_mt32_reset_call_counts
tools.description: Reset MT-32 override call counters to zero for a clean measurement window. Parameters: none (arguments must be {}). Returns success, removed entry count, removed call count, and status message.

tools.name: video_set_cursor_position
tools.description: Set the cursor position (x, y) on a given text page.

tools.name: video_set_active_page
tools.description: Set the active VGA text page (0-7).

tools.name: read_video_palette
tools.description: Read EGA/VGA palette registers, overscan border color, pixel mask, and color page state.

tools.name: read_cpu_state
tools.description: Read full CPU state (also known as 'read registers' or 'read_cpu_registers'). Returns general-purpose registers (EAX-EBP), segment registers (CS, DS, ES, FS, GS, SS), instruction pointer (IP), flags, and cycle count. CS:IP gives the address of the next instruction to execute. No parameters required.

tools.name: read_opl_state
tools.description: Read OPL/AdLib FM synthesis state: OPL mode (OPL2/OPL3/DualOPL2), AdLib Gold enable, and mixer channel name, sample rate, and enable state.

tools.name: resume_emulator
tools.description: Resume continuous execution of the emulator.

tools.name: read_bios_data_area
tools.description: Read key BIOS Data Area fields: conventional memory size, equipment flags, video mode, screen dimensions, active page, character height, CRT base address, timer counter, and last unexpected IRQ.

tools.name: video_set_mode
tools.description: Set a VGA/EGA/CGA video mode by mode ID. Optionally clears video memory.

tools.name: read_ems_page_frame
tools.description: Read mapped bytes from an EMS page frame physical page (0-3). Returns hex-encoded data.

tools.name: cryogenic_mt32_capture_reset
tools.description: Reset MT-32 golden capture buffers and parser state. Parameters: none (arguments must be {}). Returns capture status after reset.

tools.name: read_memory
tools.description: Read a memory range. Parameters: segment (ushort), offset (ushort), length (int, 1-4096). Address is two separate integers, not a combined string. Returns the address, length, and hex-encoded byte string.

tools.name: read_xms_memory
tools.description: Read bytes from a specific XMS handle at a given offset. Returns hex-encoded data.

tools.name: read_dos_current_directory
tools.description: Read the current DOS directory for the current drive or for an explicit drive letter.

tools.name: read_io_port
tools.description: Read a byte from an x86 IO port (0-65535). Returns the port number and byte value.

tools.name: go
tools.description: Alias for resume_emulator.

tools.name: video_write_pixel
tools.description: Write a pixel at (x, y) with a color index in the current graphics mode.

tools.name: cryogenic_mt32_capture_stop
tools.description: Stop MT-32 UART golden capture. Parameters: none (arguments must be {}). Returns capture status and retained event count.

tools.name: dos_set_default_drive
tools.description: Set the DOS default drive by letter (A-Z). Does not issue INT 21h.

tools.name: sound_blaster_write_mixer_register
tools.description: Write a Sound Blaster mixer register (0x00-0xFF) with a byte value. Controls volume levels, stereo, and filter settings.

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Search conventional RAM for a hex-encoded byte pattern starting at segment:offset. Returns matching segmented addresses. Useful for finding strings, code sequences, or data patterns in memory.

tools.name: midi_reset
tools.description: Reset the MPU-401 MIDI interface to intelligent mode and enqueue an ACK byte.

tools.name: read_ems_state
tools.description: Read EMS (Expanded Memory) state: page frame segment, total/allocated/free pages, active handles with names and page counts, and physical-to-logical page mappings.

tools.name: step
tools.description: Execute exactly one CPU instruction and then pause. Returns the updated CPU state (registers, IP, flags, cycles) after the step.

tools.name: sound_blaster_set_speaker
tools.description: Enable or disable the Sound Blaster DSP speaker output.

tools.name: dos_set_current_directory
tools.description: Set the DOS current directory using a DOS path (e.g. C:\GAMES\DUNE).

tools.name: midi_send_bytes
tools.description: Send raw MIDI bytes (hex string, 1-1024 bytes) through the MPU-401 data port.

tools.name: midi_enter_uart_mode
tools.description: Switch the MPU-401 MIDI interface to UART (pass-through) mode.

tools.name: video_read_character
tools.description: Read the character and color attribute stored at a specific text-mode position (page, x, y).

tools.name: step_over
tools.description: Step over one instruction. For CALL or INT, runs until the return address; otherwise single-steps. Requires nextAddress (physical = CS*16+IP + instruction length) and isCallOrInterrupt.

tools.name: cryogenic_mt32_capture_start
tools.description: Start capturing MT-32 UART output as structured MIDI events. Parameters: maxEvents (int, optional style; pass 0 to use default 20000). Returns capture status.
